title: Frances Frei endorses Incorruptible
summary: Harvard Business School professor Frances Frei calls the book both a moral compass and a practical playbook.
blockquote: Incorruptible is the rare business book that is both a moral compass and a practical playbook. Ries shows us, with rigor and optimism, how to build organizations that are worthy of our trust.
attribution_title: UPS Foundation Professor, Harvard Business School
